calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Sale Of Real Properties.
Off Calendar Dec-04-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Breen for Morgan Stanley Trust (Trustee).

The Court stated that notice had not been given to Mr. Kua. Mr. Breen reportesd that Mr. Kua was incarcerated and that the trial was to be heard in March. In addition, he stated that exhibit A to the trust, Page 8, section C had a provision regarding the sale of the real property, that Mr. Kua was not entitled to notice, that he was not available to sell the property and there was a timing issue on the sale. The Court stated that Mr. Kua's interest in the commission of the sale should be saved until we know the outcome of his case. The Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Rich Lee.
